summary: Excellent audience recording of the 3/29/90 show with Branford Marsalis and the band delivering an A‑game performance.
review: All four reviewers give this tape five stars, calling it the best‑sounding audience capture of the March 29, 1990 concert. The FLAC release is praised for its clarity, and the presence of guest saxophonist Branford Marsalis is highlighted as a standout element that puts the band on their “A” game.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high star ratings (5/5) and uniformly enthusiastic comments about both the performance and audio quality indicate an exceptional show with excellent audience recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as the best‑sounding audience tape of this date, with FLAC files noted for their clarity and detail.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers emphasize that Branford Marsalis’ sax added a special spark, suggesting the band was firing on all cylinders throughout the concert.
